case_title: UNITED GATEWAY SECURITY INC. VS CABLE CAR ADVERTISERS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED GATEWAY SECURITY INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABLE CAR ADVERTISERS, INC. CABLE CAR CHARTERS, INC. GRIDLEY, ARNOLD $3,435.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,455.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFTS. KEVIN BOWERS AND WENDY LINKA. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED.
